title: React Credit Card Preview Form

statement.markdown:
## React Credit Card Form and Live Preview

Build an interactive payment card checkout form with a live visual card layout mockup.

### Requirements:
1. **Interactive Preview**: Entering input fields (Card Number, Holder Name, Expiry Date, CVC) instantly reflects values onto an overlaying graphical card template design.
2. **Card Flipping**: Focus on the CVC input field flips the visual card to reveal its backside; focusing off flips it back.
3. **Number Formatting**: Automatically format the card number input into four-digit blocks (e.g. `xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx`) on type.
4. **Input Validation**: Add basic input patterns to validate card lengths, expiration date structures, and numerical inputs.

constraints: Must support mobile responsive layout coordinates

gradingCriteria.description: Verify that the interactive props, callbacks, and element structures work cleanly.
Verify state structure designs and clean Tailwind CSS layouts.
